mnemonics.title: CUDA Workflow: MALCF
mnemonics.content: Remember the CUDA workflow steps: Malloc, Assign (copy H2D), Launch kernel, Copy (D2H), Free -- 'My Algorithms Love Computing Fast'

mnemonics.title: GPU vs CPU: Throughput vs Latency
mnemonics.content: Think of a GPU as a wide highway with many lanes (throughput) vs a CPU as a sports car on a single lane (latency). The highway moves more total cars; the sports car moves one car faster.
